MORDREDSABER-STRIKE.title: Strike
MORDREDSABER-DEFEND.title: Defend
MORDREDSABER-REBELLION.title: Rebellion
MORDREDSABER-REBELLION.description: #Deal !D! damage, then take off your helm: enter *Rebellion.
MORDREDSABER-LOWER_THE_VISOR.title: Lower the Visor
MORDREDSABER-LOWER_THE_VISOR.description: #Put your helm on: enter *Masked Knight. Gain !B! Block and !NpCharge! *NP Charge.
MORDREDSABER-CLARENT_BLOOD_ARTHUR_UNLEAS: #Retain. Exhaust. If *Masked, first tear off your helm. Consume ALL your *NP Charge, at least 100. Deal !D! damage !Hits! times to ALL enemies; against Elites and Bosses, !Authority! more per hit; plus 1 per hit for every 20 NP Charge above 100. Then gain !Refund! *NP Charge.
MORDREDSABER-CLARENT_BLOOD_ARTHUR_INTERL: #Retain. Exhaust. Consume ALL your *NP Charge, at least 100. Deal !D! damage !Hits! times to ALL enemies; against Elites and Bosses, !Authority! more per hit; plus 1 per hit for every 15 NP Charge above 100. Then gain !Refund! *NP Charge.
